decisions.what: Keep markdown digest alongside JSON rather than generating from JSON
decisions.why: Workers write both directly — simpler than adding a generation step, and both formats serve different audiences (machine vs human)

decisions.what: Replaced verbose markdown template in SKILL.md with compact numbered steps
decisions.why: SKILL.md was at 402 lines with a 400-line soft limit; the new format is 10 lines shorter while adding the JSON indexing instructions

discoveries: SKILL.md Session Distillation section on main was already updated by a prior session (commit 4218102) — the worktree branch had the old version
summary: Added structured JSON session digests to the Fleet worker protocol. Workers now output both a .fleet/sessions/{name}.json (for machine querying by the bridge) and .fleet/sessions/{name}.md (for humans). Created the empty .fleet/index/sessions.json index that the bridge maintains. Updated SKILL.md's Session Distillation section to instruct the bridge on indexing completed sessions.
